day5_lunch_start.name: Me
day5_lunch_start.text: *The lunch bell rang. Now or never.*

day5_lunch_start_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_start_2.text: *I grabbed my bag. All the evidence in my pockets. My heart is pounding out of my chest.*

day5_lunch_branch.name: Me
day5_lunch_branch.text: *The place Yuna told me about. Old building, 3rd floor.*

day5_lunch_branch_alt.name: Me
day5_lunch_branch_alt.text: *I have to do this alone. Find the exit.*

day5_lunch_yuna_2.name: Choi Yuna
day5_lunch_yuna_2.text: "There's an emergency exit at the end of the 3rd floor. The only way out."

day5_lunch_yuna_3.name: Choi Yuna
day5_lunch_yuna_3.text: "But... we have to get through that corridor. Someone is definitely guarding it."

day5_lunch_solo.name: Me
day5_lunch_solo.text: *Walking the corridor. Where do I go? I need to find... an exit.*

day5_lunch_solo_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_solo_2.text: *Heading toward the old building. There should be an emergency exit there.*

day5_lunch_escape_start.name: Me
day5_lunch_escape_start.text: *I started running down the corridor. Footsteps behind me.*

day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_choco.text: "You smiled and said you liked chocolate milk that time. Were you... lying to me?"

day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_lunch.text: "I packed lunch every day... Was none of it worth anything?"

day5_lunch_sea_cb_promise.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_promise.text: "You nodded when I asked you to stay by my side... Liar."

day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_cb_default.text: "...We were in the same class. That alone... should have been enough."

day5_lunch_sea_block.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_block.text: "You're leaving me? ...You're going to abandon me?"

day5_lunch_sea_pass.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_pass.text: *Sea is standing in the corridor. ...But she doesn't block the way. She's staring at me blankly.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_block_high_2.text: *Sea grabbed my arm. Her grip is tight.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_block_max.text: *'Click.' Sea locked the classroom door behind her. ...There's no way out of here.*

day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_sea_block_max_2.text: "Just look at me. You only need to look at me. ...You understand, right, {name}?"

day5_lunch_sea_push.name: Me
day5_lunch_sea_push.text: *I pushed past Sea and ran. I can hear crying behind me.*

day5_lunch_escape_right.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_escape_right.text: "Well, fancy meeting you here. {name}, your checkup isn't finished yet."

day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_riin_cb_drink.text: "You said the tea was good, remember? I made it with care... Want another cup?"

day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_riin_cb_met.text: "When you came to the nurse's office on your first day, I was genuinely happy. ...Did you know that?"

day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_riin_cb_default.text: "It'll be quick. One injection and you'll feel better."

day5_lunch_riin_block.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_riin_block.text: "It'll only take a moment. One injection and... you'll feel so much better."

day5_lunch_riin_dodge.name: Me
day5_lunch_riin_dodge.text: *I dodged Riin and ran. The syringe shattered against the wall.*

day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.name: Han Sea
day5_lunch_escape_caught_sea.text: "Gotcha. ...You're not going anywhere now, are you?"

day5_lunch_escape_caught_riin.name: School Nurse
day5_lunch_escape_caught_riin.text: "Shh. It'll be over soon. It won't hurt."

day5_lunch_continue.name: Me
day5_lunch_continue.text: *Running up the stairs. The emergency exit is in sight. Almost there!*

day5_lunch_continue_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_continue_2.text: *...Ms. Eunsu is standing in front of the emergency exit.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_app.text: "You thanked me when I set up the app, remember? ...I thought you were such a good student."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_visit.text: "You came to say hello after school on your first day. That's when... I knew you were special."

day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_cb_default.text: "I did all of this for you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_2.text: "Can't you just stay with me? ...I did all of this for you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high.text: "{name}. Do you know how worried I've been? ...Let's stop this and come back now."

day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_app.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_app.text: "You thanked me when I set up the app, remember? ...I thought you were such a good student."

day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_visit.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_visit.text: "You came to say hello after school on your first day. That's when... I knew you were special."

day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_default.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_high_cb_default.text: "I did all of this for you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_high_2.text: "You're not going to listen to me? ...{name}, you're a good kid, aren't you."

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max.text: *There's a padlock on the emergency exit. ...It won't open.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_final_max_2.text: "Where do you think you're going? ...I've prepared everything. {name}, you just need to stay here."

day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_yuna_help.text: *Suddenly, the fire alarm goes off at the end of the corridor. ...It's Yuna! The moment Ms. Eunsu's attention turned away, I ran.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_break.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_break.text: *I pushed past Ms. Eunsu and threw open the emergency exit. Cold air hit my face.*

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay.name: Homeroom Teacher
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay.text: "...Thank you, {name}. This is how it should be."

day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_2.name: Me
day5_lunch_eunsu_stay_2.text: *Ms. Eunsu took my hand. ...There's no going back.*

day5_lunch_breakthrough.name: Me
day5_lunch_breakthrough.text: *Light beyond the emergency exit. The way out.*
